name: Owen Thompson
abilities: ★ Preventive Conservation — the Open's keeper of records and relics. A museum conservator by trade: he catalogs every score, preserves every specimen, and mounts the trophies (and a crocodile named Jeffery). Nothing is lost to the sands of time on his watch.

The Quiet Scholar. A fixture of the Open since before the records begin, and quietly elite of late — net 2nd in '24, 3rd in '25 — though he'll only cop to being "not very good at golf." Reads the rulebook cover to cover; finds the mushroom-sized loophole every time.
flavor: “An archive, a showroom, a lecture hall, and an inspiration — all at once.”
caption: Owen Thompson · Truffle Hogs 🐗
